title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.080 - State auditor may examine records — personally identifiable information not to be revealed
text:
630.080.  State auditor may examine records — personally identifiable information not to be revealed. — The state auditor shall have access to all records maintained and established by the department.  Any confidential records shall not be divulged in such a way to reveal personally identifiable information.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
